section_id: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer - TRO Authority
title: Temporary Restraining Order (TRO) Authority and Appeal Process
content: The authority of the Secretary to issue a Temporary Restraining Order (TRO) is removed. Submission of all the requirements of an appeal and the 60-day period to resolve the appeal automatically stay the execution of the Order.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
